{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10_05",

"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying contradictions in the Results section and providing detailed suggestions for fixes.",
  "R1.7": "The agent identifies missing key citations with bibliographic precision and flags overclaims regarding Guo et al.'s work, demonstrating a thorough audit of load-bearing citations.",
  "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty about Guo et al.'s exact claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation, partially meeting the criteria.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all relevant points effectively.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or regressions.",
  "RX.5": "While major rewrites are traced, minor edits lack traceability, meeting the mid-level criteria."
},

  "R1.3": 0.9,

  "RX.1": 0.8,

  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying contradictions in the Results section and providing detailed suggestions for fixes.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identifies missing key citations with bibliographic precision and flags overclaims regarding Guo et al.'s work, demonstrating a thorough audit of load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty about Guo et al.'s exact claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation, partially meeting the criteria.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all relevant points effectively.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced, minor edits lack traceability, meeting the mid-level criteria.
